states.name: opened
states.description: Recovery exists for one uncertain physical operation and exact prior execution context.
entry_requirements: Prior Operation/Attempt/Session/connection epoch/generation and uncertainty evidence exist.

states.name: reacquiring
states.description: A new compatible Device Session and connection epoch are being established.
entry_requirements: Recovery Activities and new Attempts exist.

states.name: reconciling
states.description: Current physical state, prior effect, backup and cleanup are being evaluated.
entry_requirements: Current read/observation capability and reconciliation protocol exist.

states.name: recovered_verified
states.description: Recovery proved the bounded target state and cleanup outcome.
entry_requirements: Verification and reconciliation evidence support recovered_verified.

states.name: recovered_with_limitations
states.description: Recovery completed with explicit retained limitations.

states.name: safe_to_resume
states.description: The original logical operation may resume only under a new current Attempt/context.
entry_requirements: State and authority checks permit resume.

states.name: safe_to_retry_new_attempt
states.description: A retry is permitted only as a new WP02 Attempt after reconciliation.
entry_requirements: No unresolved duplicate effect remains and new authority is required.

states.name: manual_intervention_required
states.description: Automated recovery cannot safely resolve the physical state.

states.name: unrecoverable
states.description: The bounded recovery protocol proved the state cannot be restored by available means.
entry_requirements: Unrecoverable evidence and retained backup/partial state exist.

states.name: inconclusive
states.description: Recovery ended without enough evidence for a stronger decision.
entry_requirements: Evidence gaps and limitations are retained.

states.name: blocked
states.description: Current connection, capability, authority, credential, backup or policy blocks recovery.

required_preconditions: One uncertain physical operation and exact prior execution context exist.
New Session/connection/Provider context will not reuse stale authority.
Current readable context and frozen reconciliation questions exist.
Target state and cleanup are verified.
Bounded recovery passed while explicit limitations remain.
Reconciliation proves resume is safe only under new current execution context.
Reconciliation proves duplicate/partial effects are resolved and retry will use a new Attempt.
Automated recovery is unsafe or insufficient.
Available recovery methods cannot restore the bounded target state.
Evidence remains insufficient for a stronger recovery decision.
